class.name: ResourceImporterCSV
class.brief_description: Imports CSV, TSV, and PSV files as CSV resources.
class.description: ResourceImporterCSV imports delimiter-separated source files into [CSV] resources for use in projects. It supports comma, semicolon, tab, and pipe delimiters, optional headers, parser options, and custom null and boolean mappings.

members.member: Comma-separated prefixes for comment rows to skip during import.
Delimiter preset used to parse the source file.
Comma-separated field values to convert to [code]false[/code].
If [code]true[/code], uses the first accepted row as dictionary keys.
Comma-separated field values to convert to [code]null[/code].
Controls how short or long rows are handled during import.
If [code]true[/code], skips rows that contain only empty fields.
If [code]true[/code], trims leading and trailing whitespace from unquoted fields.
Comma-separated field values to convert to [code]true[/code].
